pi_items.source: Magento 2 documentation confirms 'processing' is the state code for Processing state (STATE_PROCESSING constant)
Task description specifies 'Visible on Storefront: Yes', and Magento uses '1' for true/visible in boolean columns
Task description specifies label 'Ready for Pickup'
Magento 2 documentation confirms 'complete' is the state code for Complete state (STATE_COMPLETE constant)
Task description specifies 'Visible on Storefront: Yes', and Magento uses '1' for true/visible in boolean columns
Magento 2 documentation confirms 'holded' is the state code for On Hold state (STATE_HOLDED constant)
Task description specifies 'Visible on Storefront: No', and Magento uses '0' for false/not visible in boolean columns

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three custom order statuses in Magento 2. All metadata claims are verified: (1) 'quality_check' with label 'Quality Inspection' assigned to 'processing' state and visible on storefront; (2) 'ready_pickup' with label 'Ready for Pickup' assigned to 'complete' state and visible on storefront; (3) 'supplier_delay' with label 'Awaiting Supplier' assigned to 'holded' state and not visible on storefront. The state codes 'processing', 'complete', and 'holded' correspond to the standard Magento 2 order states Processing, Complete, and On Hold respectively. Visibility values '1' and '0' follow Magento database convention for boolean columns.
